meta.title: MF Digital Solutions — Web development studio
meta.description: Web development studio. Custom websites, eCommerce and internal applications for businesses that need digital tools built properly.

hero.subtitle: Sites, eCommerce and internal tools for businesses that need digital tools built properly.

items.title: Showcase sites and landing pages
items.body: Corporate sites and launch pages. Editorial architecture, structured content, optimised for organic search and performance.

items.title: eCommerce
items.body: Online stores built on Shopify or a headless architecture. Custom themes, multichannel integrations, catalogue management.

items.title: Internal tools and web apps
items.body: Internal applications to manage orders, inventory, customers and operations. Dashboards, automations, roles.

items.title: Technical consulting
items.body: Code and performance audits, architecture decisions, integrations between existing systems. Support for in-house teams.

about.title: A web development studio based in Milan.
about.para1: MF Digital Solutions designs and develops custom websites, eCommerce and internal applications. Work starts from the client's requirements and the concrete constraints of each project.
about.para2: Every project is built to measure, with attention to performance, accessibility and long-term maintainability. The technical stack is chosen to fit the project.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: For quote requests or information. Average response time: two business days.

form.name: Name
